query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `turbo_signals` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `company_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `website` varchar(500),
  `industry` varchar(100),
  `contact_name` varchar(255),
  `contact_role` varchar(255),
  `contact_email` varchar(320),
  `source_type` varchar(50),
  `source_link` varchar(1000),
  `signal_type` varchar(50),
  `date_captured` varchar(50),
  `notes` text,
  `ai_summary` text,
  `recommended_action` text,
  `opportunity_score` int,
  `file_url` text,
  `file_name` varchar(255),
  `pipeline_id` int,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `turbo_signals_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pipeline_opportunities` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `signal_id` int,
  `company_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `contact_name` varchar(255),
  `contact_email` varchar(320),
  `opportunity_score` int,
  `recommended_action` text,
  `stage` enum('lead','discovery','proposal','client','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'lead',
  `value` decimal(10,2),
  `next_step` text,
  `follow_up_date` varchar(50),
  `notes` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `pipeline_opportunities_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mission_tasks` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `company_name` varchar(255),
  `contact_name` varchar(255),
  `signal_id` int,
  `due_date` varchar(50),
  `priority` enum('low','medium','high','urgent') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  `notes` text,
  `status` enum('pending','in_progress','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `mission_tasks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pipeline_opportunities` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `signal_id` int,
  `company_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `contact_name` varchar(255),
  `contact_email` varchar(320),
  `opportunity_score` int,
  `recommended_action` text,
  `stage` enum('lead','discovery','proposal','client','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'lead',
  `value` decimal(10,2),
  `next_step` text,
  `follow_up_date` varchar(50),
  `notes` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `pipeline_opportunities_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mission_tasks` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `company_name` varchar(255),
  `contact_name` varchar(255),
  `signal_id` int,
  `due_date` varchar(50),
  `priority` enum('low','medium','high','urgent') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  `notes` text,
  `status` enum('pending','in_progress','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `mission_tasks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
